title: Fabricator-General
tier: Supreme — ruler of Mars and head of the Adeptus Mechanicus
specialty: Governance of all Forge Worlds · seat on the High Lords of Terra
lore: The Fabricator-General is the supreme ruler of Mars and the head of the entire Adeptus Mechanicus. One of the twelve High Lords of Terra, the Fabricator-General wields influence second only to the Emperor himself within the technical apparatus of the Imperium.

The position is not hereditary but meritocratic — a Fabricator-General is elevated by internal Mechanicus politics, a process so arcane and violent that it can take decades of subtle maneuvering, assassination, and doctrinal warfare among the senior Magi.

The Fabricator-General also holds the title of Fabricator-General of Mars specifically, controlling the Ring of Iron orbital shipyards, the vast forge complexes of the Red Planet, and the vault-repositories where the most sacred STC fragments are kept.
